name: Savannah Peach Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: Fresh peaches, pitted, peeled, and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together the Graham cracker crumbs, margarine, and 2 tablespoons of sugar in a small bowl. Press the mixture into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan and chill.
2. To prepare the filling, soften the gelatin in cold water in a small saucepan over low heat until dissolved.
3. In a large mixing bowl at medium speed, blend the cream cheese product, 3 tablespoons (or 4 sugar substitute packets) of sugar, and ground ginger.
4. Gradually add the gelatin mixture and milk, then mix well using an electric mixer until smooth.
5. Chill the filling until it is thickened but not set.
6. Fold in the yogurt and pour over the chilled crust.
7. Chill the cheesecake until firm, about 6 hours.
8. Just before serving, carefully remove the rim of the pan.
9. Toss together the peach slices with lemon juice and drain.
10. Arrange the peaches on top of the cheesecake.
Serves: 8
